body:
🌍 Fantastic MC 🧙‍♂️

A quality-of-life focused survival modpack for Minecraft 1.21.11 (Fabric) that enhances the vanilla experience without changing its core essence.

Explore the world with JourneyMap, travel instantly between bases using Waystones, recover your items safely with graves, and encounter brand-new creatures thanks to Alex’s Mobs.

Gameplay improvements include:

🌳 Trees fall entirely when chopped

🎒 Extra storage with backpacks

📖 Full recipe viewing with REI

✨ Clear enchantment descriptions

🪦 Safe grave system on death

Visual upgrades:

🎨 Clean and detailed textures

⚔️ More detailed and epic armor designs

⏳ Animated loading screen

This modpack is designed for players who want a smoother, more complete survival experience while keeping Minecraft’s original feel.

Fully compatible with Fabric and great for playing with friends.
